description: Letter from Natan b. Nahray to Abū ʿImrān Mūsā b. Abī l-Ḥayy. Among other matters, Natan mentions that he has given 1 dinar each to Moshe the Judge and Yeḥezqel the Alexandrian, the two frail old men who wrote T-S 13J28.10 requesting charity from Mūsā b. Abī l-Ḥayy. Natan also mentions a medicinal syrup that he has asked Abū l-Afrāḥ to buy him. ASE.
description_he: מכתב מנתן בן נהריי לאבו עמראן מוסא בן אבי אל-חי. נתן תרם לשני זקנים חלשים ומזכיר תרופה שביקש לקנות.
